assertions.title: Stripe Customer Portal Endpoint
assertions.issues: Stripe not configured in local wrangler dev environment. This is expected for local testing without real Stripe credentials. The endpoint exists and responds, but cannot return a valid Stripe portal URL without Stripe API configuration.

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with usage statistics (spikes, spike_limit, shares, share_limit, tier, reset_at)
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with complete usage data structure
5 shares created with HTTP 201, slugs: share-zio2b, share-y3vnp, share-qi4t9, share-d3cc9, share-rum6r

steps.expected: HTTP 429 with SHARE_LIMIT code and upgrade_url
steps.observed: HTTP 429 with code 'SHARE_LIMIT' and upgrade_url pointing to https://spikes.sh/pro

evidence.request1: POST /shares (5 times with valid file and metadata)
evidence.response1: All returned HTTP 201 with {ok: true, url: '...', share_id: '...', slug: '...'}

steps.action: Create share with password in metadata as free user
steps.expected: HTTP 403 with UPGRADE_REQUIRED code and upgrade_url
steps.observed: HTTP 403 with code 'UPGRADE_REQUIRED' and message 'Password protection is a Pro feature'

steps.action: Create share with webhook_url in metadata as free user
steps.expected: HTTP 403 with UPGRADE_REQUIRED code and upgrade_url
steps.observed: HTTP 403 with code 'UPGRADE_REQUIRED' and message 'Webhook configuration is a Pro feature'

assertions.title: Pro Badge Removal on Web Pages

steps.expected: Widget script tag WITHOUT data-no-badge attribute
steps.observed: Widget script: <script src="..." data-endpoint="..." data-project="..."> (no data-no-badge)

steps.expected: Widget script tag WITH data-no-badge="true" attribute
steps.observed: Widget script: <script src="..." data-endpoint="..." data-project="..." data-no-badge="true">

evidence.dataNoBadgePresent: true for Pro share, false for free share

frictions.description: Share deletion endpoint requires share ID (UUID) not slug, but API returns both. Share lookup by slug in database uses slug column but share serving route also works by slug.
frictions.resolution: Used direct database cleanup between tests to reset share count for limit testing

frictions.description: Shell token masking prevented direct use of dynamically generated bearer tokens. Tokens like 'utv-mon-api-pro-bearer-1772546914' were being masked in command output.
frictions.resolution: Used direct SQLite database inserts with fixed token values to create predictable test tokens

frictions.description: Share serving endpoint returns 404 if the uploaded file is not named 'index.html'. The default filepath lookup is 'index.html'.
frictions.resolution: Used filename=index.html when uploading share files for VAL-MON-015 web page testing

blockers.description: Stripe Customer Portal requires external Stripe API credentials which are not configured in local wrangler dev environment. The endpoint exists but cannot generate valid portal URLs.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: None - external dependency requires Stripe account setup beyond scope of local worker testing

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-MON-003, VAL-MON-005, VAL-MON-007, VAL-MON-008, VAL-MON-015), 1 blocked (VAL-MON-001 due to Stripe dependency). All monetization gating logic is correctly implemented: free tier users get 429 SHARE_LIMIT on 6th share, 403 UPGRADE_REQUIRED for password protection and webhooks, and Pro shares correctly inject data-no-badge="true" in widget script.
